message:
refactor(extensions): consolidate env var filtering via SecretBrokerPolicy

Replace the inline blocklist in is_env_var_allowed() with a delegation to
SecretBrokerPolicy::default().is_secret(). The previous implementation
maintained a separate copy of sensitive env var patterns (BLOCKED_EXACT,
BLOCKED_SUFFIXES, BLOCKED_PREFIXES) that duplicated the centralized
SecretBrokerPolicy already defined in extensions.rs.

This consolidation:
- Eliminates ~60 lines of duplicate blocklist constants
- Ensures any future additions to SecretBrokerPolicy automatically apply
  to extension environment filtering without requiring parallel updates
- Reduces the risk of policy drift between the two filter implementations
- Preserves the existing PI_-prefix allowlist behavior (handled by the
  policy's own logic)

The function's external contract is unchanged: it returns true for vars
safe to expose and false for sensitive ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
